data.name: 孤僻巨乳宅女陽子
data.detailed_description:
這個女孩是個宅系隱形巨乳，你們因為相同的宅系興趣而開始相處。和你交往的，是個怕生的宅女。因為不擅長和周圍的人交流所以為人躡手躡腳，老土，但只有對你，她會充滿興致地說著關於愛好的事，和你恩愛，一起努力。
飽嚐恩愛＆ 盡情享受宅系愛好的戀人生活♪


■創作小黃本的同時盡情做愛！和身為宅女又是畫師的女友一起創作同人本，同時做愛♪作為素描模特同時的動手動腳，互看奶子和胯下，低俗的耐久做愛，cosplay做愛，作為原稿完成的紀念而進行的做愛，線下約炮，攝影做愛等等等等禦宅族間的恩愛但又無所顧慮的各種性愛！

■現在看來變化很大的女朋友，在最開始見面的時候還是個不在意他人視線，一頭亂發的典型土女人。和你交往，希望被你更加喜歡而改變自己的髮型和服裝，成為了你最理想的女朋友！ ？享受這個反差吧！

■恩愛又充滿性愛！和戀人的色情聲線！和社恐但是可愛的女朋友的各種恩愛戀人生活聲線。滿載開始做愛後恩愛卻又慾望全開的淫語。
獻上全程無消音的這般宅女女友的淫語聲線！

特點:
  • 從原裝日本VN本地化。
  • 陽子帶有日文語音。
  • 高清16:9和4:3圖質。
  • 多小時的內容。
  • 帶有音樂和音效。
  • 帶有角色動態。
  • 帶有收藏展覽。
  • 14個與陽子H的劇情。

「孤僻巨乳宅女陽子」是一個英文本地化的VN，由著名日本製作室 Norn/Miel所創作。我們在cherry kiss櫻桃社試圖將日本遊戲帶到全世界。

**注意**
所有角色的描述和圖片都屬成人並沒有任何未成年人物用於這遊戲裡。

  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c

  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

data.name: Manga Maker's Mega Milkers
data.detailed_description:
Online you are 'ORE', a veteran pursuer of the arts, known among your peers as the 'Breast Hunter'. In reality you're just an average joe, going about your day until a fateful encounter! You bump into a girl, and as you are helping her collect her notebook, you notice its full of drawings. Not just any drawings—these are Yon_Yon’s drawings! You could tell immediately by the juicy curves of the breasts, the deep valley of cleavage, and of course the promise of big, leaky, milky titties!

As ecstatic as you are to meet one of your favorite artists, she seems just as excited to meet you, the legendary breast hunter. Thanking you for all the comments on her work that you post, what could have ended as a coincidental meet-and-greet with Yon_Yon, she asks you, her loyal fan, a favor... to help her as an "anatomy" reference for her drawings!

Of course, you agree to help her out! Fast track back to her place, the trade offer has been made; she'll show you her boobs and you'll show her your cock, Yon-Yon's got a passion for porn and will do anything for a good artistic reference. Before too long, feelings between you and Yuko blossom and what was strictly "drawing references", quickly evolves into a part kinky, part cute story of you and Yuko living out some fantasies to help her make the most magnificent ero-manga the world has ever seen!


  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel
  • Yuko is fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue
  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants
  • Hours of story content
  • Audio including music and special effects
  • Enhanced with character sprite animations
  • Gallery and Scene selections
  • 14 scenes with Yuko researching naughty activities for her manga!

Manga Maker's Mega Milkers Is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer Norn. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

**PLEASE NOTE**
All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.
